flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 31% at University of Baltimore vs the 2018–2022 baseline (1.3k vs 1.9k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at University of Baltimore fell 28% between 2021 and 2024 (1.6k → 1.1k).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at University of Baltimore fell 11% between 2021 and 2024 (67.7% → 60.0%).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at University of Baltimore rose 11% between 2017 and 2020 ($21.0k → $23.2k).
